cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. But the experiment as a whole might have lasted longer because they had to monitor the wounds. Wait, but the wounds were photographed regularly over the following days. Then on the 11th day after the biopsy, they checked the healing. So breaking it down: - Writing task: 3 consecutive days. - Then two weeks later, they had the biopsy.
